sections.paragraph:
ἐπικράζω (Lucian, Anach. 16; Pollux 5, 85; TestSol 26:9 H [‘call to’]) shout threats κατά τινος against someone Ac 16:39 v.l. W. direct discourse foll. 28:19 v.l.

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Pollux Pollux , II a.d.—List 5

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

H H = Hermas; cited, unless otherwise noted, according to MWhittaker; II a.d.—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

foll. foll. = followed, following

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 373
